# FinAgent AI sample report — DEMO

**Recommendation:** HOLD  
**Purpose:** Illustrative offline report; values are generated by the deterministic demo provider.

The virtual committee weighs fundamental quality, technical regime, market risk, news, macro conditions, management language, ownership and social signals. The final stance is evidence-weighted rather than majority-voted. Each agent publishes a score, confidence level, source list, metrics and risks so the judgment can be audited.

The PDF endpoint generates the full formatted report after an authenticated research run. This sample intentionally contains no live market assertion.
